'''Note''': This list isnt used anymore, please add your clan on the new [[Category Clans|clan list category]]

When editing this page use the header to make a list, don't throw a bunch of random signs to make a header. Keep it clean. Also, don't worry about retired clans, just throw them in here anyway. Note how the alphabetical order is there for a reason. If you are to make a member list, just mention the member that have been in that clan. The info will only grow old, and no one wants to go in and edit it each time a new member joins or leaves...

== # ==
* '''[00]''' - 0mnipotent 0rder
* '''[1st]''' - 1st
* '''2$''' - 2$ Clan
* '''[23]''' - 23
* '''|2JM|''' - [[Two J's and an M]]
* '''[42]''' - [[Clan 42]]
* '''[4eva]''' - Forever Evolution
* '''[7th]''' - Seventh

== A ==
* '''~A~''' - Avalanche
* '''{A69}''' - Area 69
* '''[aB]''' - Aurora Borealis
* '''[aC]''' - [[Annuit Coeptis|annuit Coeptis]]
* '''[aF]''' - armored Full
* '''[AK]''' - A$$ Kickers
* '''~ALT~''' - Advanced Liero Tactics
* '''(AMW)''' - [[Ancient Millenium Warriors]]
* '''{AOD}''' - [[Angels of Death]]
* '''[AoG]''' - [[Army of Glory]]
* '''[AoS]''' - Army of Scandinavia
* '''[aRT]''' - unknown meaning
* '''[AT]''' - Assault Team
* '''-=ATS=-''' - Advanced Tactics Squad
* '''(AW)''' - [[Ancient Warriors]]
* '''[AwE]''' - Advanced weapon Education
* '''[Axe]''' - The Axe Effect

== B ==
* **[B*P]** - Bad*Peace
* '''[B2K]''' - Born2Kill
* '''[BANG]''' - BANG
* '''[BAR]''' - Browning Automatic Rifle
* '''[BC]''' - Bloody Clan
* '''[BG[''' - Big Guys
* '''|BH45|''' - Brotherhood for five
* '''[Bk]''' - Budo kings
* '''[BmU]''' - Butt monkeys United
* '''[bio]''' - [[Bring it On]]
* '''[BoTe]''' - Brotherhood of the elites
* '''BS>''' - Balamb Soldiers
* '''BS>''' - Broken Sanity
* '''(BtBs)''' - [[BulleT The Blue Sky]]
* '''[BS]''' - Bullsh*t

== C ==
* '''C:\\''' - Clan-of-All-Clans
* '''[C4]''' - [[C4]]
* '''[CB]''' - [[Clan Butchery]]
* '''[CCP]''' - unknown meaning
* '''cE]''' - cache Elit
* '''[CG]''' - Chain Gang
* '''[C.K]''' Chicken Killers
'' '''[Com]''' - Unknown Name '' Someone who knows?
* '''[Cop]''' - [[Clan of pros]]
* '''[CoR]''' - Control Our Rage
* '''[CoS]''' - Company of Soldiers
* '''[cPu]''' - cPu

== D ==
* '''[D]''' - unknown meaning
* '''[DAM]''' - Dark Angel Members
* '''[DB]''' - [[Dire Badgers]]
* '''Dbp|''' - Destruction by power
* '''<DetH>''' - DetH
* '''[DG]''' - Death Gaming
* '''{DK}''' - unknown meaning
* '''|DT|''' - [[Deadly Troops]]
* '''[dnK]''' - death night Knights
* '''[DoA]''' - Death on Arrival
* '''[doh]''' - [[Doh|doh]]
* '''[DoS]''' - Destiny of Spammers
* '''[DoS]''' - Death of Slavery
* '''[DOR]''' - Defend Or Remorse
* '''{dragon}''' - dragon
* '''DS>''' - Delta Squad
* '''[dS]''' - drunken Souls
* '''[dTb]''' - Downtown Bugs
* '''[DtoD]''' - Destiny to Die

== E ==
* '''[e3]''' - [[Evolution]]
* '''[East F]''' - East Fire
* '''[eGe]''' - [[Extreme Gaming Evolution]]
* '''[EnC]''' - [[Epic nub Cakes]]
* '''[EOV]''' - Envy Our Valor
* '''[erm]''' - [[Erm|erm]]
* '''[eS]''' - eternal Souls
* '''[Est]''' - Estonian strongest troops
* '''[ET]''' - Enemy Territory
* '''[ew]''' - experienced worms

== F ==
* '''|Finno-12|''' - Finno 12
* '''[F0K]''' - Falcon 0f Kaos
* '''[FatB]''' - FatB
* '''<FBF>''' - Finnish Bug Fighters
* '''[FE]''' - Fire Emblem
* '''|FeaR|''' - FeaR
* '''<FiNe>''' - Finnish Elite
* '''[fl]''' - freelance
* '''[FoH]''' - [[Flowers of Happiness]]
* '''(FGG)''' - Frag Crazy Clan

== G ==
* '''[gb]''' - grumpy bastards
* '''[GDS]''' - The Gentlemen's Dueling Society
* '''[GM]''' - Graviton Masters
* '''God |''' - Giraffes on duty
* '''[GR]''' - [[Ghost Reapers]]
* '''[gS]''' - gunSlingers
* '''[GSSB]''' - Golden Sun Social Board

== H ==
* ''']-[''' - Hyperactive
* '''[H.K]''' - [[Sausage Fighters]]
* '''[hB]''' - hell Brigade
* '''(heh)''' - [[Heh|heh]]
* '''[HL]''' - Half-Lifers
* '''-=HP=-''' - Hakkapeliitat
* '''[HW]''' - [[Hell Worms]]

== I ==
* '''[iAc]''' - [[IAc]]
* '''[I.C.$]''' - Insane Cold $nakes
* '''[ie]''' - Irish Eejits
* '''[InP]''' - Immortal Noob Players
* '''/IRW/''' - Incredible Rifle Wurmz

== J ==
* '''[Jsp]''' - Junior School Players

== K ==
* **(K*M)** - Kill Makers
* '''[K20]''' - K√§yt√∂stavat 20
* '''{K.3.Y}''' - Killing Educated Yousers
* '''<KiNgS>''' - Kings
* '''[KoC]''' - King of Chaos
* '''[K.O]''' - Knock Out
* |:-KQ-:| - [[Killer Queens]]

== L ==
* '''[LA]''' - Lost Angels
* '''-LaB-''' - [[Like a Boss]]
* '''|LaG|''' - [[Lame Ass Gaming]]
* '''[Lap]''' - LieroX amateur players
* '''[LaS]''' - Lieros all Stars
* '''[LcD]''' - [[Let's Cheat Death]]
* '''{LD}''' - Literally Defeated
* '''|LDM|''' - Liero Devastation Masters
* '''[LDSS]''' - unknown meaning
* '''[LE]''' - Liero Empire
* '''[leke]''' - [[Liero Extreme Killers Education]]
* '''[LgP]''' - Last Government Pain
* '''[LoL]''' - Legion of Lieros
* '''[LL]''' - [[Liero Leets]]
* '''[LsoL]''' - Lone soldiers of LieroX
* '''Lv-1.0 |''' - Liero version 1.0
* '''[LXP]''' - The LieroX Patriot
* '''- (or -LaB-)''' - [[Like a Boss]]

== M ==
* '''[M]''' - [[Majin]]
* '''[M.C]''' - Mad Choppers
* '''[MaC]''' - Milk and Cookies lovers
* '''[Mafia]'''
* '''[MaW]''' - [[Masters @ Work]]
* '''[mb]''' - Miami Brothers
* '''(meh)''' - meh
* '''[MiB]''' - Mettle in Battle
* '''[mm]''' - moonlight mammoths
* '''[MMR]''' - Mass Murder Rampage
* '''[mod]''' - masters of darkness
* '''|MoP|''' - Masters of Puppets
* '''[MoS]''' - Made of Sh*t
* '''[mr]''' - Master Roses
* '''MRSL~''' - ManicRok's Skilled Lieros
* '''(MW)''' - [[Millenium Warriors]]
* '''-=MX=-''' - Morbid-X
* '''[MX]''' - Metropolitan X

== N ==
* '''[n00b]''' - n00b
* '''[NB-AT]''' - [[Nigga Blasta-Assault Team]]
* '''[NBK]''' - Natural Born Killers
* '''[nD]''' - nuclear Destroyers
* '''[Net]''' - Net
* '''[nG]''' - [[New Generation|new Generation]]
* '''[N.H]''' - [[Noob Hunters]]
* '''[nKA]''' - northern Kuoleman Aiheuttajat/[[Northern Killers]]
* '''[nn]''' - [[Nightmare Ninjas]]
* '''[NoM]''' - Novus ordo Mundi
* '''[North F]''' - North Family
* '''[NoS]''' - [[Nitrous Oxide System]]
* '''[NWO]''' - New World Order

== O ==
* '''[OK]''' - OverKill
* '''{OmA}''' - Observant Mortal Allusion
* '''[Osp]''' - [[Oldschool Players]]
* '''[OwZ]''' - [[OutlawZ]]
* '''[Oz]''' - Kylmä rinki

== P ==
* '''P|W''' - Pink Worms
* '''[PoD]''' - Patriots of Darkness
* '''[pC]''' - [[PugnaCitas]]
* '''(phys)''' - phys
* '''[PK]''' - [[Player-Killers]]
* '''[pN]''' - Pwning N00bs
* '''[PoW]''' - Preds on War!
* '''[PR]''' - Powered Reality
* '''(PRO)''' - PRO
* '''{PRP}''' - Primary Power
* '''{Psy}''' - Psy
* '''{PE}''' - Public Enemies

== Q ==
* '''{Q}''' - [[Quality]]

== R ==
* '''[R]''' - Royal flush
* '''|Ra|''' - Resolutions Assault
* '''[RaJ]''' - [[Romfret and Jerec]]
* '''RaW.2k|''' - RaW.2k
* '''[RC]''' - Republic Commandos
* '''[ReT]''' - Rad's Elite Troopers
* '''[RF]''' - The Ravaged Frontier
* '''[RIP]''' - [[Rot In Pieces]]
* '''-RO-''' - Real Owners
* '''[Roff]''' - Rise of Worms
* '''(RWP)''' - River West Park

== S ==
* '''{S}''' - Soldiers of Sunset
* '''[S77]''' - S77
* '''-=S.N.S=-''' - Shadow Ninja Syndicate
* '''[SadW]''' - Skills all da Way
* '''[SAS]''' - SAS
* '''[SDAR]''' - Smackdown And Raw
* '''[seed]''' - Superior Evolutionary Elemental Destiny
* '''[SK]''' - Supreme Killers
* '''[sMa]''' - Shoot Me Again
* '''[Sn]''' - Sexy Noobs
* '''(SNM)''' - Show No Mercy
* ''']~SrK~[''' - SrK
* '''(STA)''' - Teh Unbeatable Ass Spankers
* '''[Str8]''' - Straight
* '''[~Sun~]''' - Sun
* '''[SW]''' - Small Worms

== T ==
* **(T*S)** - Team Specialists
* '''[T2D]''' - Time To Die
* '''[T3]''' - Triple T
* '''TbfC.ee |''' - [[The Black Fighters Clan]]
* '''[TD]''' - [[Trippin Dutchman]]
* '''[TeL]''' - [[The extreme Legends]]
* '''TeS_''' The Elite Scorpions
* '''(TH)''' - Trigger Happy
* '''[THE]''' - The Holloweyes
* '''[TK]''' - [[Team Killers]]
* '''[TM]''' - TeamMatrix
* '''[TM]''' - Team Machos
* '''|ToB|''' - Tears of Blood
* '''[ToI]''' - [[Tyrants of Imperium]]
* '''ToS_''' - [[Team Omega Squadron]]
* '''[TP]''' - Takapihan pyllistys
* '''|TpS|''' - Take Position Soldier
* '''[TsL]''' - The Surviving Legionaires
* '''[Tv]''' - Television Team
* '''-te-''' - The Endless

== U ==
* '''[ufC]''' - Ultimate Fight Club
* '''[USA]''' - [[United States of America]]
'' '''''usG|''' - United SuD Gamer
* '''[Uw]''' - [[United warriors]]

== V ==
* '''(V)''' - [[Men of Valor]]
* '''~Va~''' - V√≠k√≠ng √•√±√≠m√∫s
* '''[vB]''' - Vagabond
* '''[VIP]''' - [[Viking Invincible Pantheon]]
* '''[VC]''' - Voodoo Children

== W ==
* '''|waA|''' - we are Alone
* '''[WaN]''' - [[We are Noobs]]
* '''[WaS]''' - We all Suck
* '''[WB]''' - Wimpy Bastards
* '''[wc]''' - [[Toilet Warriors]]
* '''[WK]''' - WormKillers
* '''[WoB]''' - [[Worms of Battle]]
* '''[WoF]''' - Warriors of Fate
* '''[Wol]''' - Way of life
* '''[WoS]''' - Warriors of South
* '''[WS]''' - Worm Shearer
* '''[WsW]''' - We smoke Weed
* '''[WvW]''' - World of vanishing Warriors
* '''WK|''' - [[White Knights]]

== X ==
* '''>X<''' - Crusaders of Xrist
* '''{Xes}''' - Xes
* '''[XP]''' Xtremeplayers

== Y ==
* '''(Y)''' - Yakuza

== Z ==
* '''[z0]''' - Ozone
* '''[z9]''' - Zero Gravity
* '''[zE]''' - zilent Error

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130323190038/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Clan_List -->
